content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Speechify Inc: Senior Software Engineer, Platform Anywhere in the World Florida All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0127/7517/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Florida <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.speechify.com">http://www.speechify.com</a> </p> <div><strong><br>Overview<br></strong></div> <div><br>As Speechify expands, our Platform team seeks a Senior Software Engineer. This role is central to ensuring our success at Speechify by working on key features like: Payments, Analytics, Subscriptions and our API. If you are passionate about strategizing, enjoy high-paced environments, and are eager to take ownership of product decisions, we’d love to hear from you.<br><br></div> <div><strong><br>What You’ll Do<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Design, develop, and maintain robust APIs including Public TTS API, Internal APIs like Payment, Subscription, Auth and Consumption Tracking, ensuring they meet business and scalability requirements.</li> <li>Oversee the full backend API landscape, enhancing and optimizing for performance and maintainability.&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborate on B2B solutions, focusing on customization and integration needs for enterprise clients.</li> <li>Work closely with cross-functional teams to align backend architecture with overall product strategy and user experience.</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>An Ideal Candidate Should Have<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Proven experience in backend development: TS/Node (required), Go (nice to have)</li> <li>Direct experience with GCP and knowledge of AWS, Azure, or other cloud providers.</li> <li>Efficiency in ideation and implementation, prioritizing tasks based on urgency and impact.</li> <li>Preferred: Experience with Docker and containerized deployments.</li> <li>Preferred: Proficiency in deploying high availability applications on Kubernetes</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>What We Offer<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>A dynamic environment where your contributions shape the company and its products.</li> <li>A team that values innovation, intuition, and drive.</li> <li>Autonomy, fostering focus and creativity.</li> <li>The opportunity to have a significant impact in a revolutionary industry.</li> <li>Competitive compensation, a welcoming atmosphere, and a commitment to an exceptional asynchronous work culture.</li> <li>The privilege of working on a product that changes lives, particularly for those with learning differences like dyslexia, ADD, and more.</li> <li>An active role at the intersection of artificial intelligence and audio – a rapidly evolving tech domain.</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>Think you’re a good fit for this job?&nbsp;<br></strong></div> <div><br>Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.<br>And don’t forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.<br><br></div> <div><strong><br>Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?&nbsp;<br></strong></div> <div><br>Refer them!&nbsp;<br><br></div> <div><strong><br>Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.&nbsp;<br></strong></div> <div><br>Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.<br><br></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/speechify-inc-senior-software-engineer-platform-1 Speechify Inc: Senior Software Engineer, Web Anywhere in the World Florida JavaScript and React Front-End Programming Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Florida <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.speechify.com">http://www.speechify.com</a> </p> <div><strong><br>Overview<br></strong></div> <div>With that growth comes the need for a Javascript Engineer to join the existing Web team and continue supporting the growing user base as well as building new and exciting features.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>This is a key role and ideal for someone who thinks strategically, enjoys high-pace environments, passionate about owning product decisions and has experience building and scaling complex engineering systems.</div> <div><strong><br>What You’ll Do<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Actively ship production code to the web products</li> <li>Work closely with your dedicated product team</li> <li>Participate in product discussions to shape the product roadmap</li> <li>Have the opportunity to work on new and exciting features that will impact millions of lives</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>An Ideal Candidate Should Have<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Experience. You've built and ship products that have scaled to thousands or millions of users</li> <li>Customer obsession. You are passionate about the field and have the desire to build high quality product that serves customer needs</li> <li>Speed. You work quickly to generate ideas and know how to decide which things can ship now and what things need time</li> <li>Focus. We’re a high-growth startup with a busy, remote team. You know how and when to engage or be heads down</li> <li>Collaboration. You know how to inspire, play, and negotiate with opinionated designers, marketers, and PMs</li> <li>Tech Stack: Vanilla JS, ReactJS, Redux, Firebase, Typescript</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>What We Offer<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>A fast-growing environment where you can help shape the culture</li> <li>An entrepreneurial crew that supports risk, intuition, and hustle</li> <li>A hands-off approach so you can focus and do your best work</li> <li>The opportunity to make an impact in a transformative industry</li> <li>A competitive salary, a collegiate atmosphere, and a commitment to building a great asynchronous culture</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/speechify-inc-senior-software-engineer-web-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/speechify-inc-senior-software-engineer-web-1</a></p> Sat, 23 May 2026 13:43:59 +0000 Mon, 22 Jun 2026 13:43:59 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/speechify-inc-senior-software-engineer-web-1 https://weworkremo
